onb_welcome_subtitle.message: Your tabs, organized as a tree

onb_welcome_desc.message: Tree Style Tab organizes your browser tabs into a visual tree based on how you opened them. Tabs opened from another tab become its children, making it easy to see the relationship between your tabs.

onb_quickaccess_subtitle.message: One shortcut to see all your tabs

onb_quickaccess_desc.message: Press Alt + Q to open the tab tree as an overlay on the current page

onb_feature_overlay_desc.message: Opens directly on the current page — press Escape or click outside to close

onb_feature_search_desc.message: Filter tabs by title or URL instantly

onb_feature_bookmark_desc.message: Your bookmarks also appear in search results

onb_feature_websearch_desc.message: If no tab matches, press Enter to search the web

onb_modes_subtitle.message: Choose the mode that fits your workflow

onb_modes_desc.message: Tree Style Tab supports two modes — use the one you prefer, or switch between them anytime.

onb_popup_feat1.message: Opens as an overlay on the current page

onb_modes_tip.message: 💡 Click the extension icon or press Alt + S to open the side panel — it stays open while you browse!

onb_groups_subtitle.message: Full support for native tab groups

onb_groups_desc.message: Your browser tab groups are displayed with color-coded containers. Everything stays in sync with the browser.

onb_groups_collapse_desc.message: Collapsed groups show a favicon preview strip

onb_groups_rename_desc.message: Edit group name and pick from 8 colors inline

onb_groups_sync_desc.message: Collapse or expand in either place — they stay in sync

onb_ws_subtitle.message: Save and restore your tab sessions

onb_ws_desc.message: Save all your open tabs as a workspace — including tree structure, tab groups, and marks. Restore them anytime with one click.

onb_ws_save_desc.message: Click the folder icon → "Save as Workspace" to snapshot your tabs

onb_ws_restore_desc.message: Browse saved workspaces and restore tabs, groups, and tree hierarchy

onb_ws_marks_desc.message: Tab marks (Done, Pin, WIP, etc.) are saved and restored with the workspace

onb_nav_close.message: Close tab and all its children

onb_nav_tip.message: 💡 Drag & drop tabs to reorganize the tree — even across different tab groups!

onb_ready_step1.message: Press Alt + Q for popup or Alt + S for side panel

onb_ready_step2.message: Type to search, arrow keys to navigate, Enter to switch

onb_ready_step3.message: Click groups to collapse, double-click to edit, drag to reorganize

onb_ready_cta.message: Try it now — press Alt + Q or Alt + S to begin!

onb_ready_github.message: If you find this useful, a ⭐ on GitHub means a lot!

wsPreviewEmpty.message: No workspace saved yet. Use "Save Workspace" to save your current tabs.

onb_groups_perm_desc.message: Tab Groups requires an extra permission to work.

permissionBannerDesc.message: Grant the Tab Groups permission to display and manage Chrome tab groups in the tree.
